title: sorghastrum agrostoides
intro: Sorghastrum agrostoides, also known as black june grass or yellow indiangrass, is a perennial grass native to the prairies of North America. It is used in herbal medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Sorghastrum agrostoides include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Sorghastrum agrostoides can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
